item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: meme dump to alleviate frustration
item.description:
aaaaaaaaaaaah my brain no work no good and I don't know what to do about it
Antidepressants keep me from crashing but they can only do so much
Got canned by the government a year ago and I haven't had a job since
Market's screwed, degree doesn't seem to be worth much
Figured that living right next to the state capital would help, but nope.
So now I'm just screaming into the void and hoping it'll shout back.
I want to work repairing electronics but the $12/h positions I find around here simply aren't enough.
I'd love to get old game consoles and the like to fix and sell, but the margins are low
Beyond that, I hardly even have the cash to get started. Not that I know where to get stuff.
Buy from ebay, pray to god it's something I can fix, and hope it'll sell?
I just want to fix things. Unfortunately, without making a profit, it's pointless.
And with the way the world is now, replacements are far more common than repairs.
I can solder and I know how most components work, but I'm not certified.
No certification means no one wants me anyway. It's all screwed.
Harriett tax included. Thanks for listening to me shout at the void if you read it all. Thanks for perusing if you didn't. Never made a meme dump before, might make another eventually. My government job was a contract that ended, so no unemployment. I figured working with the department of health running vaccination clinics would look good on a resume, but I have nothing. The government doesn't even want me back. I would love to repair and sell things, but I have no clue where to get it and little capital to get started. At this point I'm going to have to get a trash job I'll hate just to pay the bills. Gotta have money to make money, right? If anyone has any suggestions, I'll happily take them. Some days I have to worry about if I can keep my cat fed. Savings are dwindling fast. Life sucks and then we die, y'know? Take care everyone. Imgur's an awesome community, you're all great, I love you all. EDIT: Holy fudge, front page! First ever post, too. Spent a few hours curating some of my favorite content for this. I'm glad everyone likes it. A lot of people have been super supportive and helpful and I cannot thank you all enough. Still, my messages are open! I will never say no to advice and ideas! Getting started is the hard part. Again, you're all awesome. EDIT: Holy fudge, front page! I spent a few hours going through content to curate some of my favorite stuff, especially content I found a few years ago. Glad everybody seems to enjoy my sense of humor! Thank you all for the support and advice. I've gotten a lot of fantastic suggestions, although I'd love to keep receiving it! There's no such thing as too much good advice for me right now. You're all fantastic, I can't say it enough.

item.title: Disgusting
item.description: Disgusting. Weak. Reprehensible. Cowards. Unforgivable. I just watched the video that was released. They edited it to remove the screams of the children, but I'm not sure they should have. I think we should hear exactly what they heard when they decided to stand idly by and let this slaughter happen. I hope the screams of those precious babies echo in their thoughts and bore into their minds and keep them awake at night. They don't deserve the luxury of peace of mind anymore.

item.title: I present to you: The River Runner
item.description: By popular demand on this post from yesterday (https://imgur.com/gallery/XlZrDTP), I wanted to share with you a website where you can place a raindrop anywhere in the continental US and follow it to the sea. @pistrisca @PineappleIsDeliciousOnPizzaFightMe https://river-runner.samlearner.com FP Edit: Woohoo! Pls send pics of cute cats!

item.dc:creator: DumpsterKoala

item.title: 7/7/22 freedom
item.description: Thursday I had to make the decision to leave. My husband of 13 years was not a man I recognized, he was paranoid, controlling and began destroying property and spending all the money. I brought the cops out for an involuntary mental admittance and they found meth on him. That was it. That was the cause of my year from hell. Restraining order is up, he is gone. Now my job is to get out of the financial ruin he left me in. Fixing the property he destroyed, and repairing the relationships with people I was not allowed to talk to. Mainly loving myself again and that I was not the problem or cause. It has been freeing to be able to openly talk to people without fear that my phone would be smashed or my cars interior would be slashed up more.
item.dc:creator: mentallydrowning

item.dc:creator: Miiaka

item.title: Stay home if your fucking sick
item.description: I don’t give a fuck how tough you think you are, coming into work sick as fuck is inexcusable. Now me and my entire team have COVID because one “super tough” guy who can work through anything couldn’t stay home. Fuck you right wing lunatics. So fucking tired of this horse shit.
item.dc:creator: bodsquad
